panels.title: Create interactive storytelling experiences
panels.description: Build cinematic scroll stories, visual narratives and immersive content blocks that can be embedded directly into Framer websites and modern landing pages.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 14%, rgba(138, 91, 255, 0.54) 0%, rgba(138, 91, 255, 0.12) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 82% 18%, rgba(47, 212, 255, 0.45) 0%, rgba(47, 212, 255, 0.08) 38%, transparent 66%), radial-gradient(circle at 52% 86%, rgba(198, 109, 255, 0.33) 0%, rgba(198, 109, 255, 0.06) 46%, transparent 72%), linear-gradient(128deg, #060914 0%, #0f1f46 46%, #131b44 100%)

panels.title: Design your story visually
panels.description: Add slides, images and markdown content. Choose between narrative layouts like circular flows, vertical storytelling or interactive story maps.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 22% 17%, rgba(217, 255, 0, 0.54) 0%, rgba(217, 255, 0, 0.12) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 76% 23%, rgba(0, 198, 255, 0.45) 0%, rgba(0, 198, 255, 0.08) 38%, transparent 66%), radial-gradient(circle at 61% 82%, rgba(154, 103, 255, 0.33) 0%, rgba(154, 103, 255, 0.06) 46%, transparent 72%), linear-gradient(136deg, #050713 0%, #17224f 46%, #131b44 100%)

panels.title: Publish instantly
panels.description: When your story is ready, Scrollix generates a live embed URL connected to your content. No exports or builds required.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 26% 20%, rgba(127, 92, 255, 0.54) 0%, rgba(127, 92, 255, 0.12) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 70% 28%, rgba(35, 168, 255, 0.45) 0%, rgba(35, 168, 255, 0.08) 38%, transparent 66%), radial-gradient(circle at 52% 78%, rgba(111, 227, 255, 0.33) 0%, rgba(111, 227, 255, 0.06) 46%, transparent 72%), linear-gradient(144deg, #08061a 0%, #1d1a54 46%, #131b44 100%)

panels.title: Paste into Framer and go live
panels.description: Copy the embed code into any Framer Embed block and your interactive story becomes part of your website automatically, fully responsive and always editable.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 14%, rgba(162, 91, 255, 0.54) 0%, rgba(162, 91, 255, 0.12) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 82% 33%, rgba(255, 61, 61, 0.45) 0%, rgba(255, 61, 61, 0.08) 38%, transparent 66%), radial-gradient(circle at 61% 74%, rgba(255, 149, 0, 0.33) 0%, rgba(255, 149, 0, 0.06) 46%, transparent 72%), linear-gradient(152deg, #070914 0%, #111f5b 46%, #131b44 100%)
